title: Practice partner
privacyNote: This is a practice tool, not a prediction. The real person may respond differently — the skills you build here carry either way.

setup.heading: Practice with {{name}}
setup.body: You'll have the conversation with an AI playing your loved one — it talks back with a real voice and pushes back the way real people do, so the hard sentences aren't new on the day that matters.
setup.voiceOn: 🔊  Voice replies on — tap to practice in text only
setup.voiceOff: 🔇  Voice replies off — tap to hear them talk back
setup.reassurance: You can't hurt anyone here. Sessions save privately to your account so you can see your progress — and you can delete any of them, anytime.
setup.whyTitle: This is practice — and practice is the point
setup.whyBody: This isn't a game you win. Addiction has compromised your loved one's ability to make healthy choices, so the person you'll really face may deflect, bargain, or lash out no matter how well you speak. The partner here won't just give in either — because the real one won't. What changes with every rep is you: steadier nerves, cleaner words, a calmer hold on your ask. That's what walks into the real room.

guarded.title: Guarded
guarded.desc: Minimizes and deflects — "it's not that bad, I've got it under control."

defensive.title: Defensive
defensive.desc: Argues, never yells — turns everything around on you, keeps score, picks your words apart. Cold, not loud.

volatile.title: Heated
volatile.desc: Explodes — gets loud, swears, gets personal, threatens to storm out. A fight, not a debate.

tearful.title: Guilt-ridden
tearful.desc: Collapses into shame and self-blame — "I'm a screw-up, I should just disappear" — and pulls you into comforting them instead of answering your ask.

chat.intro: Say your opening line to {{name}} — the way you actually would. Hold the mic to speak, or type. You go first.
chat.placeholder: Say it the way you would say it…
chat.micPermissionBody: To practice out loud, allow microphone access. You can also practice by typing.
chat.turnsDone: Session complete — get your feedback below
chat.error: Couldn't reach your practice partner. Check your connection and try again.
chat.safetyBody: It sounds like you might be carrying something real right now. Tap here for immediate support options — this matters more than rehearsal.
chat.openingLabel: Your opening line — tap to use it

debrief.heading: Coach's feedback
debrief.encouragement: There's no winning or losing here — there's only getting readier. Run it again with a different mood, or a harder one. Every rep makes the real conversation better.

history.title: Past sessions
history.subtitle: Your reps, saved. Watch the scores climb.
history.empty: No sessions yet. Finish a practice conversation and its transcript and coaching will be saved here.
history.deleteBody: This removes the transcript and coaching feedback permanently.
history.privacyNote: Sessions are visible only to you. Audio is never saved.
